subject: [PATCH v3 02/10] fuse: refactor io-uring header copying to ring

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch refactors the logic for copying headers to a ring in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) io-uring implementation. It extracts the header copying into a new function called copy_header_to_ring(), which centralizes error handling and rate-limited logging, making the code more clear and maintainable. The patch modifies several functions that interact with the ring, replacing direct calls to copy_to_user() with calls to the new function.
